channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: India's UN Security Council Seat Bid Is Logical: UN Watchdog Chief Rafael Grossi

media:content.media:description: Grossi's remarks come as race to succeed current UN Secretary General gathers pace

item.description: Grossi's remarks carry particular weight not only because of the ongoing race to succeed current UN chief, but also because of his stature as head of world's top nuclear watchdog and a seasoned global diplomat
item.content:encoded: Grossi's remarks carry particular weight not only because of the ongoing race to succeed current UN chief, but also because of his stature as head of world's top nuclear watchdog and a seasoned global diplomat

item.title: Iran-Linked Hackers Claim FBI Drone Breach, Threaten World Cup Team Buses

media:content.media:description: The hacker group claimed it had gained access to footage collected by FBI first-person-view drones.

item.description: The group alleged it had been monitoring "every image and every suspect" for several months.
item.content:encoded: The group alleged it had been monitoring "every image and every suspect" for several months.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why No 'Law' Can Bring Justice For 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack
item.description: This is Trump's war, and he will do whatever it is that he wants with his 'big beautiful' navy.
item.content:encoded: This is Trump's war, and he will do whatever it is that he wants with his 'big beautiful' navy.

item.title: Meet Jayshree Ullal, Indian-Origin CEO On US' Richest Self-Made Women List

media:content.media:description: Jayshree Ullal developed an interest in technology and engineering from an early age.

item.description: Born in London and raised in New Delhi, Ullal developed an interest in technology and engineering from an early age
item.content:encoded: Born in London and raised in New Delhi, Ullal developed an interest in technology and engineering from an early age

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The PoK Mess Exposes the Limits of Pakistan's Kashmir Narrative
item.description: Islamabad has long viewed political mobilisation in PoK through an external lens of alleged Indian 'interference'. But the recent uprisings in the region lays bare the limits of its own policy.
item.content:encoded: Islamabad has long viewed political mobilisation in PoK through an external lens of alleged Indian 'interference'. But the recent uprisings in the region lays bare the limits of its own policy.

item.title: "False, Unfounded": UAE Rejects Reports Alleging Transfer Of Funds To Iran

media:content.media:description: The White House did not immediately respond to a request for comment on the move

item.description: However, the UAE denied reports of transferring funds to Iran.
item.content:encoded: However, the UAE denied reports of transferring funds to Iran.

item.title: Anthropic Suspends Fable 5, Mythos 5 AI Models After US Security Order

media:content.media:description: Fable 5, released Tuesday, is a locked-down version of Mythos 5

item.description: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.content:encoded: Just three days after publicly launching Fable 5, the company said in a blog post that it received a government directive banning all foreign nationals from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5

item.title: Peace Deal Soon? US Official 80-85% Confident, But Iran Has Some Conditions
item.description: Though pitched as a major diplomatic victory, the proposed agreement will only establish a 60-day ceasefire that would be followed by another set of negotiations.
item.content:encoded: Though pitched as a major diplomatic victory, the proposed agreement will only establish a 60-day ceasefire that would be followed by another set of negotiations.

item.title: 3 Indians Died In US Strikes. 10 Others Were Killed When A Jet Fell From Sky
item.description: Three Indians were killed in an US strike on a vessel off the coast of Oman. It is not the first time that Indians have come under the line of fire from American miscalculations.
item.content:encoded: Three Indians were killed in an US strike on a vessel off the coast of Oman. It is not the first time that Indians have come under the line of fire from American miscalculations.

item.title: Glowing Orbs, Potato-like Object: In US' New UFO Files, No Answers On Aliens

media:content.media:description: US' transparency campaign has led to the release of about 300 files dating to the 1940s.

item.description: A person whose name is blacked out reported coming home and seeing an intense light hovering below the trees in their backyard.
item.content:encoded: A person whose name is blacked out reported coming home and seeing an intense light hovering below the trees in their backyard.

item.title: Leader Of "Bloodthirsty" Terror Outfit Tren De Aragua Killed In US Strike

media:content.media:description: Trump have consistently blamed Tren de Aragua for being at the root of the violence

item.description: Tren de Aragua has been labeled by the United States as a terrorist organization. Guerrero Flores was chargedwith racketeering conspiracy and other crimes, including lending support to terrorists in crimes
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1112481/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Tren de Aragua has been labeled by the United States as a terrorist organization. Guerrero Flores was chargedwith racketeering conspiracy and other crimes, including lending support to terrorists in crimes

item.title: From Homes To Fuel: What Elon Musk's $1 Trillion Can Actually Buy

media:content.media:description: According to Forbes, Musk's net worth actually hit $1.1 trillion on Friday

item.description: Musk's new title arrives amid a wider acceleration for the richest of the rich. Year after year, his former (although now very distant) billionaires club has reaped a growing number of members - from tech titans to celebrities.
item.content:encoded: Musk's new title arrives amid a wider acceleration for the richest of the rich. Year after year, his former (although now very distant) billionaires club has reaped a growing number of members - from tech titans to celebrities.

item.title: 1 Dead, 10 Injured In Texas Shooting, Suspect Fired At Cop Days Earlier

media:content.media:description: Police have provided limited details about how the shooting unfolded

item.description: The suspect, 45-year-old Victor Mata Villarreal, already was being sought by authorities when he began firing at police and bystanders in Midland on Friday
item.content:encoded: The suspect, 45-year-old Victor Mata Villarreal, already was being sought by authorities when he began firing at police and bystanders in Midland on Friday

item.title: Trump Claims Iran Tried To Attack Indian Ships With Drones, Slams Deal 'Leak'

media:content.media:description: After an attack on a Palau-flagged tanker MT Settebello, three Indian sailors died

item.description: US President Donald Trump's comment comes after three vessels with Indian crew came under attack off the Omani coast this week.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump's comment comes after three vessels with Indian crew came under attack off the Omani coast this week.

item.title: US-Iran War Live: Iran, US Say Deal Close, But Disagreements Persist Over Terms
item.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.
item.content:encoded: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.

item.title: US Secretary Of State Marco Rubio Compares UFC To 1969 Moon Landing

media:content.media:description: Rubio compares UFC's founding to the Moon landing.

item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio compares UFC's founding to the Moon landing ahead of the UFC Freedom 250 event.
item.content:encoded: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio compares UFC's founding to the Moon landing ahead of the UFC Freedom 250 event.

item.title: "Not Justified": S Jaishankar To Marco Rubio On Killing Of 3 Indian Sailors

media:content.media:description: S Jaishankar said "such lethal actions against commercial shipping are 'not justified'".

item.description: The EAM S Jaishankar while speaking to his US counterpart Rubio on Friday evening also added that "such lethal actions against commercial shipping are 'not justified'".
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1112453/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The EAM S Jaishankar while speaking to his US counterpart Rubio on Friday evening also added that "such lethal actions against commercial shipping are 'not justified'".

item.title: Indian-Origin Man Jailed For 34 Years In UK For Kidnapping And Rape

media:content.media:description: Gagandeep Singh will serve a 34-year sentence, comprising 28 years in custody.

item.description: The court heard that the woman became suspicious when she was asked to deliver a suitcase containing unknown items from Thailand back to the UK in June 2024.
item.content:encoded: The court heard that the woman became suspicious when she was asked to deliver a suitcase containing unknown items from Thailand back to the UK in June 2024.

item.title: US Court Rejects Bid To Halt Removal Of Trump Name From Kennedy Center

media:content.media:description: Last month, court ordered Trump's name taken off the iconic building in the nation's capital by Friday.

item.description: US federal judge on Friday rejected a bid by the board of the Kennedy Center and the Justice Department to halt the removal of President Donald Trump's name from the performing arts venue.
item.content:encoded: US federal judge on Friday rejected a bid by the board of the Kennedy Center and the Justice Department to halt the removal of President Donald Trump's name from the performing arts venue.

item.title: As Trump Predicts Iran War's End, Some Objectives Unfulfilled

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war.

item.description: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war, with a memorandum of understanding to be signed in the coming days.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war, with a memorandum of understanding to be signed in the coming days.
